scripts.build: bun run --filter @farfield/web build && bun run build:sidecars && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.lint: bun run --filter @farfield/web build && bun run build:sidecars && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @farfield/web build && bun run build:sidecars && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.build:sidecars: bun run --filter @farfield/server build:sidecar && bun run --filter @farfield/web-host build:sidecar
scripts.tauri:build: node ../../scripts/prepare-windows-bundled-codex.mjs && bun run --filter @farfield/web build && bun run build:sidecars && bunx tauri build
